title: Jeevan Yudh
desc: In order to find his father's killer, Rohit goes back to his hometown. When he meets the new police officer, he unravels a dark truth.

title: Abhagini
desc: Abhagini is tortured by her stepmother all her life, but she decides to make a new start after leaving the city. Initially, the new family she is living with dislikes her, but she soon wins them over.

title: Tomai Pabo Bole
desc: Two neighbouring families are embroiled in a bitter rivalry. However, in an interesting turn of events, the son of one family falls in love with the daughter of the other.

title: Amar Shapath
desc: A young boy's parents are killed by a dangerous criminal who also kidnaps his sister. Several years later, he plans to find his sister and avenge his parents' death by murdering the culprit.

title: Debar
desc: A family's fate teeters when the eldest brother tragically dies while supporting his youngest sibling's education. The sibling then strives to honour his sacrifice and repay his sister-in-law.

title: Big Boss
desc: A young man turns into a crime lord after a dirty conspiracy almost destroys his life, setting up a series of dangerous events to follow.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
desc: Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
desc: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Anjali
desc: A devout father arranges his daughter's marriage with a renowned businessman. However, the daughter secretly resents the union as she is madly in love with her boyfriend.
